properties.query:
let watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group = (_GetWatchlist("watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group") | project SearchKey);
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Add member to group"
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| extend GroupName = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[1].newValue)
| where GroupName in~ (watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group) // Grupos sensibles, modificar whatchlist
| extend AddUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend AddUserId = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[0].newValue)
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| project TimeGenerated, TargetUsername = AddUser, TargetUserScopeId = AddUserId, GroupName, ActorUsername
properties.description: Detecta miembro añadido a un grupo sensible definido en watchlist.
properties.displayName: [TEST] PR-CLD-032-T1078.004 Miembro añadido a grupo sensible
